channel.title: Pokemon GO News & Events
channel.description: Official Pokemon GO + GO Hub + LeekDuck

item.title: [GO Hub Events] National Trust x Pokémon GO Events
item.description:
Pokémon GO has teamed up with the National Trust in the UK to make your Pokémon adventures more interesting than ever! From historic houses and castles to gardens, parklands, and coastal landscapes, the National Trust offers countless opportunities for adventure. Trainers will be able to enjoy special Pokémon GO activities at participating National Trust locations […]

The post National Trust x Pokémon GO Events appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Super Mega Starmie Raid Day (2026): Shiny Odds, Counters & Bonuses
item.description:
During GO Fest trainers globally completed 45 hourly Global Challenges for the Ultra Unlock challenge, resulting in the debut of Mega Starmie in Pokémon GO! Mega Starmie will debut during a special Super Mega Raid Day event on Saturday, August 22, 2026, from 11:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time. You can look forward to […]

The post Super Mega Starmie Raid Day (2026): Shiny Odds, Counters & Bonuses appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day (August 2026)
item.description:
Gigantamax Rillaboom returns to Pokémon GO during a special Max Battle Day event on Saturday, August 1, 2026. For the first time, it can be shiny! Trainers can look forward to increased Max Particle limit, three special trades for the day, Gigantamax Rillaboom appearing on all Power Spots and more! Read on for all details, CP ranges, […]

The post Gigantamax Rillaboom Max Battle Day (August 2026) appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Summer Marathon: Arctic Embers Event
item.description:
Shiny Snom makes their Pokémon GO debuts during the Summer Marathon: Arctic Embers event! Running from Tuesday, August 4, at 10:00 a.m. to Monday, August 10, 2026, at 8:00 p.m. local time, the event features a new GO Pass, boosted Shiny rates for select Pokémon, timed research, and more. This guide covers everything you need […]

The post Summer Marathon: Arctic Embers Event appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Wild Area 2026 Event Dates Announced
item.description:
After the hype of the 2026 Pokémon GO Fest events and the excitement of Mega Mewtwo X and Y, we are buzzing to share that the Pokémon GO Wild Area is returning in November 2026! This year there will also be two in-person Pokémon GO Wild Area events, alongside the global event. The Pokémon GO […]

The post Pokémon GO Wild Area 2026 Event Dates Announced appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO World Championships Switch to 3v3 Team Format in 2027
item.description:
The Pokémon Company has revealed several major changes for the 2027 Pokémon Championship Series, including a completely new format for the Pokémon GO World Championships. For the first time, the Pokémon GO World Championships will feature 3-on-3 team competition, with teams formed from the pool of individually qualified players. Dates and venues have also been […]

The post Pokémon GO World Championships Switch to 3v3 Team Format in 2027 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Fire and Ice Hatch Day
item.description:
Trainers, Prepare your Incubators! We’re excited to announce that Magby and Smoochum will be featured during the upcoming Fire and Ice Hatch Day event!  Fire and Ice Hatch Day takes place on Saturday, August 8th, 2026, from 11:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time. This limited-time event features Magby and Smoochum eggs with boosted shiny […]

The post Fire and Ice Hatch Day appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Super Mega Raichu Raid Day
item.description:
Mega Raichu X and Mega Raichu Y debut in Pokémon GO during a special Super Mega Raid Day event on Saturday, July 18, 2026, from 2:00 p.m. to 5:00 p.m. local time. Trainers can look forward to Mega Raichu X and Mega Raichu Y in Super Mega Raids, with the potential to be shiny (with […]

The post Super Mega Raichu Raid Day appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: TCG 30th Celebration, New Pokémon Aeroplane, PokémonXP & Worlds Schedule, New LEGO and more!
item.description:
This week in Pokémon news has some really exciting announcement, with the 30th Celebration products for TCG being teased, a brand new Pokémon aeroplane, the schedule for the World Championships and PokémonXP event have been announced, new LEGO sets have been revealed, Zorua is coming to Pokopia, and a new POKÉTOON short has been released […]

The post Pokémon News Weekly Roundup: TCG 30th Celebration, New Pokémon Aeroplane, PokémonXP & Worlds Schedule, New LEGO and more! appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] Dynamax Trubbish Max Monday: Event Guide
item.description:
Trubbish Max Monday takes place on July 13th, 2026 when Trubbish will be appearing in power spots all day. This Max Monday is the third July Pokémon, and it is the return of Dynamax Trubbish! Dynamax Trubbish is a type which means it is only weak to and moves. It is a Tier 1 Dynamax […]

The post Dynamax Trubbish Max Monday: Event Guide appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub Events] This Week in Pokémon GO: July 20 – July 26, 2026
item.description:
Pokémon GO’s July 20-26 week has us well into the season of Forever Forward! The post-GO Fest 10th anniversary celebrations continue with Professor Willow’s birthday! Professor Pikachu debuts, along with First Partner Pokémon with special 10th anniversary backgrounds. Plus the weekly rotating Raid Hours, Spotlight Hour, Dynamax Battles and Mega Raids. ⭐Highlights Raid Boss Change […]

The post This Week in Pokémon GO: July 20 – July 26, 2026 appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.

item.title: [GO Hub News] Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Raid Make-Up Event
item.description:
During Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Global certain areas experienced issues with raids. This led to Scopely Explore turning off Team GO Rocket to help the event run smoother. Trainers experienced technical issues when attempting to join raid battles that led to them being unable to participate in raids. As a result, a special make-up raid […]

The post Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Raid Make-Up Event appeared first on Pokémon GO Hub.
